BTC was the first memecoin.

thread_tweets.text: @ROR_Traders Issuing shares at a discont will be a dissaster. As the yeild rises and Bitcoin falls, MSTR will burn through its cash and its Bitcoin must faster. The lower the price of Bitcoin, the more MSTR has to sell to cover the yeild on STRC. The only way out is to cancel the dividend.
